name: medai-council
description: MedAI Council — multi-agent clinical deliberation system (Next.js frontend + FastAPI backend)

scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.api:dev: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.api:verify: cd apps/api && uv run python -c 'import main; import auth; import council; print("import ok")'
